description: Canonical allowlist of models the CUA playground exposes. Edit THIS file to add/remove models — the backend and frontend read it at runtime.

models.notes: Fast, lightweight Gemini CU model. Sole supported Gemini SKU per official Computer Use docs.
Claude Opus 4.7 — most capable model for complex reasoning and agentic coding. Supports up to 2576px long edge with 1:1 coordinates.
Claude Sonnet 4.6 — requires beta endpoint + computer_20251124 tool.
OpenAI Responses API built-in computer tool.

Per OpenAI API changelog 2026-04-20: GPT-5.4 nano supports compaction, but does NOT support tool search or computer use. Kept in the registry so non-CU callers can still pick it; excluded from the CU-capable list.
